model.signalforge_test_small.dim_users.name: dim_users
model.signalforge_test_small.dim_users.raw_code:
-- Mart: refs the staging user model (proves ref(...) edge in the manifest).
select
    user_id,
    email,
    created_at
from {{ ref('stg_users') }}

model.signalforge_test_small.fct_orders.name: fct_orders
model.signalforge_test_small.fct_orders.raw_code:
-- Mart: a synthetic fact built from a CTE so it can compile even though the
-- staging order model is disabled. Refs dim_users to keep the ref graph
-- non-trivial.
with synthetic_orders as (
    select
        1 as order_id,
        user_id,
        cast('2025-01-01' as date) as ordered_at,
        100.00 as amount
    from {{ ref('dim_users') }}
)

select
    order_id,
    user_id,
    ordered_at,
    amount
from synthetic_orders

model.signalforge_test_small.stg_users.name: stg_users
model.signalforge_test_small.stg_users.raw_code:
-- Staging model: pulls from the raw users source (proves source(...) edge).
select
    id as user_id,
    email,
    created_at
from {{ source('raw', 'users') }}

source.signalforge_test_small.raw.users.name: users
source.signalforge_test_small.raw.users.description: Raw user rows from the synthetic source system.

macro.dbt_duckdb.duckdb__get_catalog.name: duckdb__get_catalog
macro.dbt_duckdb.duckdb__get_catalog.macro_sql:
{% macro duckdb__get_catalog(information_schema, schemas) -%}
  {%- call statement('catalog', fetch_result=True) -%}
    with relations AS (
      select
        t.table_name
        , t.database_name
        , t.schema_name
        , 'BASE TABLE' as table_type
        , {{ adapter.catalog_comment('t') }} as table_comment
      from duckdb_tables() t
      WHERE t.database_name = '{{ database }}'
      UNION ALL
      SELECT v.view_name as table_name
      , v.database_name
      , v.schema_name
      , 'VIEW' as table_type
      , {{ adapter.catalog_comment('v') }} as table_comment
      from duckdb_views() v
      WHERE v.database_name = '{{ database }}'
    )
    select
        '{{ database }}' as table_database,
        r.schema_name as table_schema,
        r.table_name,
        r.table_type,
        r.table_comment,
        c.column_name,
        c.column_index as column_index,
        c.data_type as column_type,
        {{ adapter.catalog_comment('c') }} as column_comment,
        '' as table_owner
    FROM relations r JOIN duckdb_columns() c ON r.schema_name = c.schema_name AND r.table_name = c.table_name
    WHERE (
        {%- for schema in schemas -%}
          upper(r.schema_name) = upper('{{ schema }}'){%- if not loop.last %} or {% endif -%}
        {%- endfor -%}
    )
    ORDER BY
        r.schema_name,
        r.table_name,
        c.column_index
  {%- endcall -%}
  {{ return(load_result('catalog').table) }}
{%- endmacro %}

macro.dbt_duckdb.duckdb__list_relations_.name: duckdb__list_relations_without_caching
macro.dbt_duckdb.duckdb__list_relations_.macro_sql:
{% macro duckdb__list_relations_without_caching(schema_relation) %}
  {% call statement('list_relations_without_caching', fetch_result=True) -%}
    select
      '{{ schema_relation.database }}' as database,
      table_name as name,
      table_schema as schema,
      CASE table_type
        WHEN 'BASE TABLE' THEN 'table'
        WHEN 'VIEW' THEN 'view'
        WHEN 'LOCAL TEMPORARY' THEN 'table'
        END as type
    from system.information_schema.tables
    where table_schema = '{{ schema_relation.schema }}'
    and table_catalog = '{{ schema_relation.database }}'
  {% endcall %}
  {{ return(load_result('list_relations_without_caching').table) }}
{% endmacro %}
